headline: GE Vernova Aggressively Scaling Investments: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
summary: GEV's $11 billion investment push, including upgraded Italian R&D and manufacturing sites, targets grid reliability, growth and stronger margins.

headline: Eaton (ETN) Expands Home Energy Push With FranklinWH Partnership
summary: Eaton and FranklinWH Energy Storage announced a new collaboration on intelligent home energy systems and virtual power plant technology. The partnership centers on integrating Eaton’s AbleEdge smart breakers with FranklinWH’s home energy storage platform to support advanced load management and grid services. Eaton (NYSE:ETN) is extending its presence in residential energy with this tie up, aligning its Home as a Grid focus with FranklinWH’s storage capabilities. The company’s stock is...
